paragraphs.source: As mentioned above the VR NVL72 compute tray is designed around the cableless concept. As we discussed in our [PCB Supercycle Core Research note in August last year](https://semianalysis.com/institutional/ai-server-pcb-super-cycle-copper-foil-content-upgrade/) as well as our recent [Core Research note on Amphenol’s AI Content](https://semianalysis.com/institutional/amphenol-content-growth-vr-nvl144-backplane-board-to-board-connectors-dac-acc-aec-tam-kyber-midplane-backplane/), there are two reasons for this design. First, flyover cables present multiple different points of failure as they can easily be damaged during assembly. Second, the high-density design of VR NVL72 leaves limited space for cables to be routed.

pro.text: 正如前文所述，VR NVL72 算力托盘是围绕无线缆设计理念构建的。正如我们在 [去年 8 月的 PCB 超级周期核心研究报告](https://semianalysis.com/institutional/ai-server-pcb-super-cycle-copper-foil-content-upgrade/) 以及最近的 [关于安费诺 AI 业务占比的核心研究报告](https://semianalysis.com/institutional/amphenol-content-growth-vr-nvl144-backplane-board-to-board-connectors-dac-acc-aec-tam-kyber-midplane-backplane/) 中所讨论的，这种设计有两个原因。首先，架空线缆（Flyover Cables）在组装过程中极易损坏，从而产生多个不同的故障点。其次，VR NVL72 的高密度设计导致布线空间非常有限。

paragraphs.source: For the GB200/300, the most valuable cable that is exclusively supplied by Amphenol is the DensiLink OverPass cable set within the compute tray. This cable provides the ethernet connection between the CX-7/8 NIC and the OSFP cages. However, this cable is extremely vulnerable to scratches and damage of the cable termination during assembly, thereby creating many points of failure. There are also several other lower-end PCIe cables in use (MCIO and SlimSAS) that also suffer from the same points of failure. These cables involve many other suppliers as well – complicating procurement and vendor management. Given the delicate nature of the cable, workers must be extremely careful while placing the cables in a very dense and compact chassis, which prolongs assembly time.

pro.text: 对于 GB200/300 而言，由安费诺（Amphenol）独家供应的最具价值的线缆是算力托盘内的 DensiLink OverPass 线缆组。该线缆负责 CX-7/8 网卡与 OSFP 笼子之间的以太网连接。然而，这种线缆在组装过程中极易发生划伤和端接损坏，从而产生大量故障点。此外，系统中还使用了其他几种低端 PCIe 线缆（如 MCIO 和 SlimSAS），它们同样面临这些故障风险。这些线缆涉及多家供应商，增加了采购和供应商管理的复杂性。鉴于线缆的脆弱性，工人在极其致密紧凑的机箱内布线时必须异常小心，这延长了组装时间。

paragraphs.source: Although a cableless design might initially appear unfavorable for Amphenol, it is in fact a positive. Signals between the Strata module and the daughter modules still need a physical interconnect. In this architecture, those signals exit the Strata board through Amphenol’s PaladinHD2 board-to-board connectors. The signal is then routed through a PCB midplane sitting in the middle of the chassis. On the other side of the PCB midplane, the daughter modules connect to the PCB midplane via another set of Paladin HD2 B2B connectors. In our VR NVL72 Component BoM and Power Budget Model we have a detailed breakdown of Amphenol’s compute tray content in Vera Rubin NVL72.

pro.text: 尽管无线缆设计最初看起来似乎对安费诺不利，但事实恰恰相反。Strata 模块与子模块之间的信号仍需要物理互连。在这种架构中，这些信号通过安费诺的 PaladinHD2 板对板连接器离开 Strata 板。随后，信号通过位于机箱中部的 PCB 中板进行路由。在 PCB 中板的另一侧，子模块通过另一组 Paladin HD2 B2B 连接器与中板相连。在我们的 VR NVL72 物料清单（BoM）与功耗预算模型 中，我们详细列出了安费诺在 Vera Rubin NVL72 算力托盘中的供应价值占比。

paragraphs.source: For the GB200/GB300, the PCIe signal distance between the GPU/CPU and the CX-7/8 is shorter than the Ethernet/InfiniBand signal distance between the CX-7/8 and the OSFP cages. Previously – having to transmit a 200G Ethernet/InfiniBand signal from the NIC in the back half of the compute tray to the OSFP cage in the front of the compute tray necessitated the use of flyover cables as the signal loss over PCB at 200Gbit/s (uni-directional) per lane is too high.

pro.text: 对于 GB200/GB300 而言，GPU/CPU 与 CX-7/8 之间的 PCIe 信号传输距离短于 CX-7/8 与 OSFP 笼子之间的以太网/InfiniBand 信号传输距离。此前，由于单通道 200Gbit/s（单向）信号在 PCB 上的损耗过高，必须使用架空线缆（Flyover Cables）将 200G 以太网/InfiniBand 信号从算力托盘后半部的网卡传输到前端的 OSFP 笼子。

paragraphs.source: But now that the NIC is closer to the OSFP cage, the lower speed PCIe Gen6 signal (64Gbit/s per lane uni-directional) travels the longer distance. By making the PCIe Gen6 signal longer, the signal can travel over PCB given that PCIe Gen6 has better signal integrity than the higher speed 200G Ethernet/InfiniBand signal.

pro.text: 而现在，网卡距离 OSFP 笼子更近，速率较低的 PCIe Gen6 信号（单通道单向 64Gbit/s）则承担了更长距离的传输。通过增加 PCIe Gen6 信号的传输长度，信号可以直接通过 PCB 传输，因为 PCIe Gen6 的信号完整性优于速率更高的 200G 以太网/InfiniBand 信号。

paragraphs.source: First, we must understand why high-speed signals perform worse on PCB versus flyover cables. As SerDes rates increase, high-speed channels become increasingly constrained by insertion loss introduced by PCB traces, vias, dielectric materials and conductor roughness. Insertion loss is defined as the signal power that is lost as a signal is traveling through an interconnect channel.

As SerDes rates increase, high-speed channels become increasingly constrained by insertion loss introduced by PCB traces, vias, dielectric materials and conductor roughness. Insertion loss is defined as the signal power that is lost as a signal is traveling through an interconnect channel.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: First, we must understand why high-speed signals perform worse on PCB versus flyover cables. As SerDes rates increase, high-speed channels become increasingly constrained by insertion loss introduced by PCB traces, vias, dielectric materials and conductor roughness. Insertion loss is defined as the signal power that is lost as a signal is traveling through an interconnect channel.

pro.text: 首先，我们必须理解为什么高速信号在 PCB 上的表现逊于架空线缆（Flyover Cables）。随着 SerDes 速率的提高，高速通道日益受到 PCB 走线、过孔、介电材料和导体粗糙度所产生的插入损耗（Insertion loss）的限制。插入损耗被定义为信号在互连通道中传输时损失的信号功率。

paragraphs.source: Conductor loss is driven by copper surface roughness. As signals travel down the copper traces in the PCB, energy is lost due to the resistance in copper. At higher frequencies, the signal traveling through the copper crowds toward the surface of the trace, which is known as the skin effect. On top of the natural resistance of copper, if the surface is rough, the current will not travel along a uniform path incurring more resistance and loss.

pro.text: 导体损耗受铜箔表面粗糙度的影响。当信号在 PCB 的铜走线中传输时，能量会因为铜的电阻而损失。在高频下，通过铜导体的信号会向走线表面集中，这就是所谓的趋肤效应。除了铜的固有电阻外，如果表面粗糙，电流将无法沿均匀路径传输，从而导致更高的电阻和损耗。

paragraphs.source: Dielectric loss is driven by the energy absorption nature of the dielectric materials. Dielectric materials, resins and glass fiber cloth, provide insulation and mechanical reinforcement function for the PCB traces. At high frequency, high-speed signal doesn’t simply travel through the copper traces, the signal traves as an electromagnetic wave with electric field extending into the dielectric materials. As the signal propagates, the dielectric absorbs a portion of the energy and dissipates as heat, contributing to insertion loss. Dielectric loss scales with frequency, hence dielectric loss is a dominant limiter of signal performance of long reach PCB traces.

pro.text: 介质损耗是由介质材料的能量吸收特性驱动的。介质材料（如树脂和玻璃纤维布）为 PCB 走线提供绝缘和机械强化功能。在高频下，高速信号不仅仅在铜走线中传输，还会以电磁波的形式传输，其电场会延伸到介质材料中。随着信号的传播，介质会吸收一部分能量并以热量的形式耗散，从而产生插入损耗。介质损耗随频率增加而增大，因此，介质损耗是限制长距离 PCB 走线信号性能的主要因素。

paragraphs.source: Geometry loss describes the insertion loss incurred from abrupt structures of the PCB traces. Real PCB channels include many abrupt structures, such as vias and layer swaps. These are like bumps in a highway, and signals could reflect backward and be interrupted increasing insertion loss.

paragraphs.source: Another factor that affects signal performance is cross-talk. Given the increase in the number of I/Os per GPU, lane density in the PCB also increases. Cross-talk describes the scenario where the copper traces are too close to each other and the signal from one lane affects the signal in a neighboring lane. Some copper traces are designed for power as well. When the power lanes are too close to the signal lanes, noise from the power lanes can also modulate the signal as well.

pro.text: 影响信号性能的另一个因素是串扰。鉴于每个 GPU 的 I/O 数量增加，PCB 中的通道密度也随之增加。串扰描述的是铜走线彼此距离过近，导致一个通道的信号影响相邻通道信号的情况。一些铜走线也专门用于供电。当电源走线与信号走线距离过近时，来自电源走线的噪声也会对信号产生调制作用。

paragraphs.source: In conclusion, insertion loss scales with signal frequency, and high-speed signal suffers more insertion loss from PCB than from fly over cables. Hence, as traditional CPU servers upgrade to higher signaling frequencies such as upgrading to newer PCIe generations, the CPU server design increases the adoption of fly over cables to compensate for insertion loss from the PCB. The alternative solution would be upgrading PCB materials, however, fly over cables are more cost effective and remain feasible for traditional server applications.

The alternative solution would be upgrading PCB materials, however, fly over cables are more cost effective and remain feasible for traditional server applications.

pro.text: 总之，插入损耗随信号频率而增加，高速信号在 PCB 中遭受的插入损耗比在架空线缆（Flyover Cables）中更严重。因此，随着传统 CPU 服务器升级到更高的信号频率（例如升级到更新的 PCIe 版本），CPU 服务器设计增加了对架空线缆的采用，以补偿 PCB 产生的插入损耗。替代方案是升级 PCB 材料，然而，架空线缆更具成本效益，且对于传统服务器应用仍然可行。

paragraphs.source: On the material side, CCL content upgrades from M7 to M8/M9 drives material upgrades. Copper foil is upgraded to HVLP4 across the board for the main compute and networking boards. A glass fiber cloth upgrade is necessary to reduce dielectric loss, but whether quartz cloth (Q glass) is necessary remains a debate. Below let’s discuss the materials upgrade and the key considerations behind the adoption of each material.

pro.text: 在材料方面，CCL（覆铜板）规格从 M7 升级到 M8/M9 推动了材料的全面升级。主算力板和网络板的铜箔已全面升级至 HVLP4。为了降低介质损耗，玻纤布的升级必不可少，但目前对于是否有必要采用石英纤维布（Q 玻纤）仍存在争议。下面我们将讨论材料升级以及采用每种材料背后的关键考量。

paragraphs.source: The classification of CCL materials is determined by its dielectric constant (Dk) and dissipation factor (Df) at a given frequency. Insertion loss is lower at lower Dk and Df value. The common classification is anchored to the Megtron series from Panasonic as they have been setting the industry standard. When people describe the CCL as M7 classification it usually means it matches the same Dk and Df specifications as Megtron 7 of Panasonic.

When people describe the CCL as M7 classification it usually means it matches the same Dk and Df specifications as Megtron 7 of Panasonic.

pro.text: CCL 材料的分级取决于其在特定频率下的介电常数（Dk）和损耗因子（Df）。Dk 和 Df 值越低，插入损耗就越小。通用的分级标准通常参考松下（Panasonic）的 Megtron 系列，因为该系列一直设定着行业标准。当人们将 CCL 描述为 M7 级别时，通常意味着其 Dk 和 Df 规格与松下的 Megtron 7 相匹配。

paragraphs.source: Copper foil content in Rubin is upgraded from HVLP2 to HVLP4 grade copper foil for the signal layers. As discussed earlier, due to the skin effect, smoother copper foil equals to lower insertion loss. HVLP is the classification of copper foil standing for Ultra-Low Profile Copper Foil. The higher the HVLP grade equals to lower surface roughness.

paragraphs.source: For the power layers, the additional layers in Strata compared to Blackwell are mostly power layers to accommodate more power going into the GPU. By adding more dedicated power layers, cross talk is reduced as power layers and signal layers are separated. Power layer copper foils are much thicker to insulate the current travelling through it.

pro.text: 在电源层方面，Strata 与 Blackwell 相比增加的层数主要是电源层，以承载进入 GPU 的更大电流。通过增加更多的专用电源层，由于电源层与信号层实现了分离，串扰得以减少。电源层铜箔要厚得多，以便承载流经的电流。

paragraphs.source: The glass fiber cloth upgrade aims to reduce the dielectric constant of CCL. Beside glass fiber cloth, resin is also a key factor contributing to dielectric constant. To achieve a desirable dielectric constant, the CCL makers have their unique recipes to their formulation of the two dielectric materials in the CCL. Currently, debate around the CCL spec is around the adoption of Quartz cloth (Q glass).

pro.text: 玻璃纤维布的升级旨在降低 CCL 的介电常数。除玻璃纤维布外，树脂也是影响介电常数的关键因素。为了达到理想的介电常数，CCL 厂商在 CCL 的这两种介电材料配方上都有各自的独特秘方。目前，围绕 CCL 规格的争论集中在是否采用石英纤维布（Q-glass）。

paragraphs.source: Quartz cloth is the next generation material that replaces the glass fiber cloth materials as the reinforcing layer, pushing dielectric constant even lower. Besides lower dielectric constant, quartz cloth also has the benefits of being stronger, more temperature resistance, and having a lower CTE. On the other hand, the cost is multiples higher than that of the highest-grade glass fiber cloth and is much harder to process at the PCB manufacturing level, leading to worse yield.

pro.text: 石英纤维布是替代玻璃纤维布作为增强层的下一代材料，能将介电常数推至更低水平。除了更低的介电常数外，石英纤维布还具有强度更高、耐温性更好以及热膨胀系数（CTE）更低的优点。另一方面，其成本比最高级别的玻璃纤维布还要高出数倍，且在 PCB 制造环节的加工难度大得多，导致良率较低。

paragraphs.source: Within VR NVL72, Quartz is initially adopted for the Orchid board and the midplane to allow the longest distance PCIe Gen 6 signal traveling through these two boards with as little insertion loss as possible. However, given the cost of the Quartz cloth and the difficulty in Q cloth processing, Nvidia is currently exploring the option of downgrading back to glass fiber cloth. The final decision is pending on the signal performance with the downgraded glass fiber cloth.

pro.text: 在 VR NVL72 中，石英纤维最初被用于 Orchid 板和中板（midplane），以确保 PCIe Gen 6 信号在穿过这两块板卡进行长距离传输时，插入损耗尽可能小。然而，考虑到石英纤维布的成本和加工难度，英伟达（NVIDIA）目前正在探索降级回玻璃纤维布的方案。最终决定将取决于降级为玻璃纤维布后的信号性能表现。

paragraphs.source: Beside material upgrade, the other driver of PCB content value is the increase of high end PCB area coverage. In Grace Blackwell, the only boards with high end material are the Bianca board with M7 grade CCL and the NVSwtich board with M8 grade CCL, leaving front half of the compute tray uncovered by high end PCB board. For VR NVL72, the Orchid board and the midplane board increases the high end PCB board area in the compute tray covering the front half of the chassis. With the Strata board bigger than the Bianca board and the extra peripheral boards in the compute tray, we estimate that the area of high end PCB board increases by ~2.3 times from GB300 to VR NVL72.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Beside material upgrade, the other driver of PCB content value is the increase of high end PCB area coverage. In Grace Blackwell, the only boards with high end material are the Bianca board with M7 grade CCL and the NVSwtich board with M8 grade CCL, leaving front half of the compute tray uncovered by high end PCB board. For VR NVL72, the Orchid board and the midplane board increases the high end PCB board area in the compute tray covering the front half of the chassis. With the Strata board bigger than the Bianca board and the extra peripheral boards in the compute tray, we estimate that the area of high end PCB board increases by ~2.3 times from GB300 to VR NVL72. As the tables shows, the Orchid board is the main contributor to the delta of total high-end PCB area between GB300 and VR NVL72 rack.

pro.text: 除了材料升级外，PCB 价值增长的另一个驱动因素是高端 PCB 覆盖面积的增加。在 Grace Blackwell 中，仅有采用 M7 级 CCL 的 Bianca 板和采用 M8 级 CCL 的 NVSwitch 板使用了高端材料，这使得算力托盘的前半部分未被高端 PCB 板覆盖。对于 VR NVL72，Orchid 板和中板增加了算力托盘中的高端 PCB 面积，覆盖了机箱的前半部分。由于 Strata 板比 Bianca 板更大，且算力托盘中增加了额外的周边板卡，我们估计从 GB300 到 VR NVL72，高端 PCB 面积的增量约为 2.3 倍。
